product.title: L'Oreal Paris Makeup Infallible Fresh Wear Foundation in a Powder, Up to 24H Wear, Waterproof, Ivory Buff, 0.31 oz. (Packaging May Vary)
featureBullets: Powder Foundation: With a weightless texture that gives full coverage and a natural, matte finish that looks fresh hour after hour, this powder foundation feels breathable and weightless, wearing for up to 24 hours

All Day Coverage: With a blurring effect and all day matte finish, this powder evens skin tone with no transfer and covers like a liquid with no cakey look, Non-comedogenic, waterproof, heatproof and sweatproof
The Infallible Collection: Turn to the cosmetics the pros use and get long-lasting color, expert definition, and full coverage formulas that actually stay put with Infallible
Because You're Worth It: Create the look you want with our full line of makeup including foundations, concealers, highlighter makeup, brow pencils, eyeshadow palettes, lipsticks and much more
L'Oreal Paris Beauty: A leading total beauty care company based in Paris, we offer innovative products and unique expertise from beauty experts in makeup, skin care, hair care, styling and hair color
product.description: Demand more from longwear! Infallible up to 24hr fresh wear foundation-in-a-powder covers like a liquid a mattifies with no cakey look. The weightless powder texture gives full coverage and a natural, matte finish that looks fresh hour after hour. The formula feels breathable and weightless leaving skin feeling comfortable for up to 24hrs. With a blurring effect and all day matte finish, this powder evens skin tone with no transfer. It is waterproof, heatproof and sweatproof. Available in 16 shades and suitable for all skin types, even oily skin and acne prone skin. It is non-comedogic with no greasy feel and has been tested under dermatological control.

specification.value: Long-lasting coverage, matte finish, all-day shine control, suitable for oily and acne-prone skin
#1,679 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #104 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers praise the foundation's buildable coverage, smooth texture, and lightweight feel on the skin. The product receives positive feedback for its quality and ease of application, with one customer noting it can be layered for more coverage. The longevity and natural finish receive mixed reviews - while some say it lasts all day, others find it wears off too easily, and while some appreciate the matte finish, others describe it as cakey. The color match is also mixed, with some finding it perfect for their skin tone while others say it's too light.

reviews.reviewTitle: Love! Have repurchased and will continue to repurchase!!
reviews.reviewText: This L’Oreal Paris pressed powder is great! I have repurchased this probably 5 times. I goes on easy! Has the perfect amount of coverage I would say it’s more on the medium-heavy side. It’s a great price point compared to other expensive powders that do the same thing this one does. The texture is powder but goes on very smooth. Like all powder doing your proper skin care prep before hand will make all the difference of how your makeup and powder will look. I will continue to purchased and recommend to anyone looking for a flawless coverage look that will last through the day!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I bought it because I ran out of the product I normally used and also because they raised the price a lot. I wanted to try this brand because it was recommended to me and it is much cheaper than the one, I am using. I tried both at the same time, one on one side of my face and the other on the other, and the truth is that I didn't see any difference. It has good coverage, the durability is good, I only touched it up once, the color match perfect. I recommended it is 10 of 10.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Flawless, smooth finish that lasts all day!
reviews.reviewText: “I’m honestly impressed with this powder foundation. It gives a smooth, natural finish and really helps control shine without looking dry or cakey. The coverage is buildable and it blurs pores so well, especially for everyday wear. I love how long it lasts — even after hours it still looks fresh and doesn’t separate. Great quality for the price and I’d definitely repurchase.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 24, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: GREAT PRODUCT, BUT HARD TO MATCH TO SKIN COLOR, POORLY PACKED FOR SHIPPING!
reviews.reviewText: PROS: &gt, Quick, easy makeup all in one. &gt, Excellent as total makeup, or as a oil dimming powder over any foundation. &gt, FULL coverage. You can re-apply to achieve the level of coverage you like. &gt, Looks natural. &gt, Creamy, sweatproof, and waterproof. &gt, Hides imperfections without being heavy. &gt, Doesn't cake. &gt, Wonderful for oily skin. *MAKEUP ARTIST TIP: If you have oily skin pair with Palladio Rice Paper Facial Tissues for Oily Skin for touch ups. It absorbs oil and sweat, but leaves the powder foundation untouched. Refreshes your makeup by adding a tiny amount of rice powder. CONS: &gt, They arrived cracked, or crack shortly after a couple of uses because they are VERY POORLY wrapped for shipment. I've reported this more than once, but nothing changes. They are less expensive to buy here, but they are also more likely to crack or break. &gt, Difficult to get a proper color match. &gt, There is no translucent shade because this is a powder + foundation all in one. &gt, Some colors are nearly identical. &gt, I have 6 onhand right now. Most of them I'll never use because the colors are off. There's no rhyme or reason for their color choices. The names they give the colors don't match what you would think they would be. This is a huge turnoff for me. I would purchase many more if I knew what to actually buy.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 8, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is a great item good coverage 👍
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I really love this powder foundation. It gives great coverage while still feeling very lightweight on the skin. It blends easily and helps control shine throughout the day. My skin looks smooth and natural, and it doesn’t feel cakey at all. I’m very happy with this purchase!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Powder fell completely out of the compact
reviews.reviewText: The product itself is good… I do HATE that it has a fragrance…that’s just not needed in a foundation (or any facial products). But anyways, the powder was broken up just a bit in a small spot when delivered, which was somewhat expected….what wasn’t expected was for the entire powder portion to then just completely fall out when slightly tipped to clear the small broken bits from delivery. So, now it’s unusable (unless I want an huge mess every time) and I’ll have to buy another, which I’ll probably just do at the store in person. I would just expect it to be more durable in the container so it wouldn’t fall out.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 10, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I’ve tried expensive brands and I end up always going back to this one. It is the best all around. Lasts all day and coverage is perfect and feels like nothing on. Just needs better packaging because it creates a mess and it’s hard travel with without it breaking up in the compact.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Very good my wife love it
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on November 26, 2024

reviews.reviewText: This foundation is great! I switched from MAC Studio Fix (they completely butchered the new formula). I was looking for something comparable to the old beloved formula that they had done so well on for 20+ years! This one works just as well for half the price! Coverage is buildable, it smoothly fills in all of the imperfections like pores and fine lines. It is not dry feeling, but silkier. I have oily skin, and this seems to work all day. I apply before work very early in the morning, hit the gym after work, and it's still just as good as when I applied. If I get a bit oily (this happens with any foundation) I just take a tissue and blot and it looks fresh as new! Highly recommend this. I hope they don't screw it up and change the formula like so many other companies lately. It would be nice if they restocked my shade though. Last 2 purchases were not from here. I posted a question asking the seller why they are always out of stock and someone responded stupidly (also nothing to do with the question) why am I ordering this, that is drying, etc....um lady, yeah, I have very oily skin, and it WORKS for me. I was asking why the seller/Amazon never has it in stock. Read questions BEFORE you respond please. Ugh
